title: TDF officer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the position of Trade Defense Force officer|the position of [[trade officer]]}}
'''TDF officers''' were the organic individuals who held a position of authority and responsibility in the [[Trade Defense Force]] of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]], usually in command of the [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|private droid forces]]. They were also stationed on [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class battleships]] with [[OOM pilot battle droid/Legends|pilot droids]]. Their uniform [[Color/Legends|colors]] varied from red to black to gray, but always had opalescent stripes. The [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] [[Blox Hatha]] was one of these officers.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]''
